possible_dialog: The wasps rebuilt their nest in my backyard, can you clear it out?
I need another exterminator, the other one got stung so badly by the wasps he was sent to the hospital.
I would like the wasp nest in my backyard cleared out.
I don't know why the wasps keep building their nest in my backyard but I need them cleared out again.
reject_dialog: Whatever it is, I don't want to buy it.
I'm not interested in purchasing anything.
unavailable_msg:
The door is locked...
You see a giant wasp nest in the bushes - you should probably avoid going near it.
first_dialog: Hello, are you the exterminator that I hired?
Well then, I'm not interested in whatever you're trying to sell. *He starts closing the door*
Oh, well then, great! Some wasps built a giant nest in my backyard and I need it removed, can you do that?
player_dialog: Wait! I... misspoke. I am the exterminator.
Sure, would you like your lawn mowed as well?
first_job_offer: I was planning on mowing my lawn after the wasp nest was removed but sure, why not.
